da.jsonld_desc: Møblerede lejligheder til yogalæreruddannelsesstuderende i København. Beliggende 800m fra Yoga Bible studiet i Christianshavn.
da.jsonld_faq1_q: Hvad koster en studiebolig under Yoga Bible uddannelse?
da.jsonld_faq1_a: Single studio lejligheder koster 9.500 kr for hele uddannelsesperioden. Delt double lejlighed koster 6.500 kr pr. person. Alt forbrug er inkluderet.
da.jsonld_faq2_q: Hvor langt er boligen fra Yoga Bible studiet?
da.jsonld_faq2_a: Studieresidensen ligger cirka 800 meter fra Yoga Bible studiet på Torvegade 66, Christianshavn — ca. 10 minutters gang eller 3 minutters cykeltur.
da.jsonld_faq3_q: Kan man lave sin egen mad under yogalæreruddannelsen i København?
da.jsonld_faq3_a: Ja. Alle lejligheder har et fuldt udstyret køkken. Budget-supermarkeder som Netto og Rema 1000 ligger i nærheden. At lave mad derhjemme koster ca. 55-75 kr om dagen.
da.jsonld_faq4_q: Hvad er de gennemsnitlige månedlige leveomkostninger for en yogastuderende i København?
da.jsonld_faq4_a: Ekskl. bolig: mad (lav selv) ~1.500-2.500 kr/md, cykeludlejning ~175 kr/md, kaffe & ekstra ~500-800 kr/md. I alt ca. 2.500-4.000 kr pr. måned.
da.hero_title: Bo tæt på studiet — vi ordner resten
da.hero_subtitle: Møblerede lejligheder i Christianshavn, København. Fair priser, alt inkluderet, 10 minutters gang fra Yoga Bible. Designet til kursister, der rejser hertil for at træne.
da.why_title: Vi har gjort det nemt for dig
da.why_lead: Mange af vores kursister rejser fra andre byer i Danmark, fra Sverige, Tyskland eller endnu længere væk. Derfor har vi lavet en aftale med en boligpartner tæt på studiet — så du slipper for den stressende boligjagt i København og kan fokusere 100 % på din uddannelse.
da.why_checks: Ingen depositum-bøvl eller CPR-krav|Datoer afstemt med kursusstart og -slut|Fuldt møbleret med køkken og bad|Alt forbrug inkluderet i prisen|~800 m fra Yoga Bible — gå eller cykl|Risikofrit: fuld refundering ved aflysning
da.rooms_lead: Vi tilbyder to boligtyper specifikt til kursister, der kommer fra andre byer eller udlandet. Fair priser, enkel logistik og tæt på studiet — så du kan fokusere på praksis og progression.
da.single_price_fine: Inkl. forbrug · Perfekt hvis du ønsker ro, privatliv og et trygt sted at lade op mellem workshops.
da.single_features: ~800 m fra studiet|Eget fuldt udstyret køkken — lav din egen mad|Studie- & co-working områder|Lounge, café, vaskeri|24/7 sikkerhed & adgang til fitness|Forbrug inkluderet (wifi, el, vand, varme)|Cykeludlejning muligt (lille gebyr)
da.double_tag: Delt lejlighed · Dit eget private soveværelse
da.double_price_fine: En stærk løsning, hvis du ønsker fair pris og en enkel, rolig base tæt på studiet.
da.double_features: ~800 m fra studiet|Dit eget private soveværelse|Delt køkken — lav mad sammen eller for dig selv|Studie- & co-working områder|Lounge, café, vaskeri|24/7 sikkerhed & adgang til fitness|Forbrug inkluderet (wifi, el, vand, varme)|Cykeludlejning muligt (lille gebyr)
da.rooms_refund: Risikofrit: Fuld refundering af boligbetaling, hvis kurset aflyses.
da.rooms_tip: Tip: Er du i tvivl om datoer? Kontakt os på info@yogabible.dk — så hjælper vi dig med den bedste løsning.
da.amenity_title: Alt du har brug for under dit ophold
da.amenity_lead: Residensen er bygget til studerende og unge professionelle. Her er hvad der venter dig.
da.amenity1_desc: Fuldt udstyret med komfur, ovn, køleskab og redskaber. Lav din egen sunde mad og spar penge.
da.amenity2_desc: Rolige zoner med wifi, strøm og gode stole. Perfekt til anatomi-læsning eller planlægning af undervisning.
da.amenity3_desc: Nøglekort-system og overvågning. Du kan komme og gå som det passer — også til tidlige morgenyoga-sessions.
da.amenity4_desc: Vaskemaskiner og tørretumblere i bygningen. Du behøver ikke slæbe vasketøj rundt i byen.
da.amenity5_desc: Fitnesscenter i bygningen — perfekt til supplerende styrketræning på fridage fra yogaprogrammet.
da.amenity6_desc: Højhastigheds-wifi, el, vand og varme — alt er inkluderet. Ingen overraskelser.
da.cook_lead: Alle lejligheder har et fuldt udstyret køkken. Du bestemmer selv, hvad du spiser — og du sparer markant i forhold til at spise ude i København.
da.cook_desc: Budget-supermarkeder som Netto, Rema 1000 og Lidl ligger inden for kort gåafstand. Mange kursister meal-prepper sunde, plantebaserede måltider og deler mad i fællesskabet.
da.cook_tip: Tip: Download appen Too Good To Go — køb overskudsmad fra restauranter og bagerier til halv pris.
da.loc_lead: Yoga Bible ligger på Torvegade 66 i Christianshavn — et af Københavns mest charmerende kvarterer. Kanaler, caféer, Christiania og havnebadet er alt sammen inden for få minutters gang.
da.loc_map_title: Yoga Bible studio lokation — Torvegade 66, Christianshavn, København
da.budget_eyebrow: Hvad koster det at bo i København?
da.budget_lead: København er ikke billigt — men det behøver ikke at være dyrt. Her er et realistisk overblik over dine udgifter som yogakursist (ud over bolig og kursus).
da.budget_row3_note: Swapfiets 175 kr/md · Brugt cykel fra 500 kr
da.budget_tip1: Cykl overalt. Swapfiets til 175 kr/md slår enhver transportløsning. København er bygget til cykler.
da.budget_tip2: Meal prep søndag. Lav mad til hele ugen. Dine medkursister gør det — lav det sammen!
da.budget_tip3: Too Good To Go. Overskudsmad fra restauranter og bagerier til 30-50% af prisen.
da.budget_tip4: Drik postevand. Københavns vand er fantastisk. Tag en genanvendelig flaske med overalt.
da.alt_eyebrow: Foretrækker du at finde din egen bolig?
da.alt_lead: Vores tilbud er den nemmeste løsning — men hvis du hellere vil finde noget selv, har vi samlet de bedste muligheder for dig herunder.
da.hotel_desc: Alle inden for gå- eller cykelafstand fra studiet i Christianshavn.
da.hotel1_desc: Danmarks første flydende hotel. 12 intime værelser med havneudsigt, geotermisk opvarmning, dansk morgenmad.
da.hotel2_desc: 128-værelses designhotel på Papirøen, trin fra Nyhavn. Gratis minibar, tagterrasse, a la carte restaurant.
da.hotel3_desc: Design-hostel med dorms og private værelser nær Kongens Nytorv. 10 min cykel til studiet. Perfekt til budgetbevidste.
da.hotel3_price: Dorm fra ~175 kr · Privat fra ~860 kr
da.hotel4_desc: Industriel-nordisk hostel med pool, fitnesscenter og biograf. 15 min cykel fra studiet. Mere end et typisk hostel.
da.hotel4_price: Dorm fra ~220 kr · Privat fra ~960 kr
da.rental_desc: En studiolejlighed i Christianshavn koster typisk 1.000–2.000 kr/nat på Airbnb. For længere ophold (4+ uger) kan du ofte forhandle en bedre pris.
da.coliving_desc: Hvis du har en længere tidshorisont (8+ uger), kan studieboliger og coliving-koncepter være en attraktiv mulighed.
da.coliving1_desc: 463 lejligheder, biograf, fitness, studierum, tagterrasse. Semesterbaseret.
da.coliving2_desc: Community-drevet, bæredygtigt, overkommeligt. Social og bevidst tilgang til bolig.
da.coliving3_desc: Alt-inklusiv pris (leje + wifi + Netflix + rengøring). Ingen indskud. Fleksible kontrakter.
da.fb_desc: Mange finder værelser og lejligheder via Facebook. Her er de mest aktive grupper:
da.fb4_desc: Engelsksprog · Find en roommate til delt lejlighed
da.fb_scam_warning: ⚠️ Pas på svindel: Overfør aldrig penge, før du har set boligen og underskrevet en kontrakt. Brug verificerede platforme og vær opmærksom på for-gode-til-at-være-sande tilbud.
da.course_lead: Bolig er relevant for kursister, der rejser til København. Her er de programmer, der typisk har brug for overnatning.
da.course1_desc: 200-timers Yoga Alliance certificering. Fuld immersion — mandag til lørdag, morgen til aften.
da.course2_desc: 200-timers certificering med mere tid til integration. Perfekt balance mellem intensitet og hverdagsliv.
da.course3_desc: Kombiner 2-3 specialkurser (inversions, splits, backbends) til én intensiv måned med rabat.
da.faq_lead: Alt det praktiske du har brug for at vide, inden du booker.
da.faq1_q: Hvornår kan jeg flytte ind og ud?
da.faq1_a: Indflytning er typisk 1-2 dage inden kursusstart, og udflytning er dagen efter kurset slutter. De præcise datoer afhænger af den måned, du vælger. Vi sender dig alle detaljer, når du har reserveret.
da.faq2_a: Alt forbrug er inkluderet: wifi, elektricitet, vand, varme. Lejligheden er fuldt møbleret med seng, skrivebord, garderobe, køkken (komfur, køleskab, redskaber) og badeværelse. Sengetøj og håndklæder medbringes selv eller kan købes billigt i IKEA/Flying Tiger.
da.faq3_a: Ja! Residensen tilbyder cykeludlejning (lille gebyr). Du kan også bruge Swapfiets (175 kr/md for din egen cykel med reparationsservice inkluderet) eller købe en brugt cykel via DBA.dk eller Facebook Marketplace fra 500-1.500 kr.
da.faq4_a: Nej, der er intet depositum eller ekstra gebyrer. Du betaler den fulde pris ved reservation, og det er det. Ingen overraskelser.
da.faq5_a: Hvis Yoga Bible aflyser kurset, får du fuld refundering af din boligbetaling. Risikofrit.
da.faq6_a: Det afhænger af tilgængelighed. Kontakt os på info@yogabible.dk, og vi tjekker mulighederne for dig. Mange kursister vælger at blive lidt ekstra i København efter kurset.
da.faq7_a: Single-lejligheder er private — du bor alene. Double-lejligheder deles med en medkursist af samme køn, medmindre I selv aftaler noget andet (f.eks. par eller venner, der rejser sammen).
da.faq8_q: Kan jeg have gæster eller kæledyr?
da.faq8_a: Overnatningsgæster er generelt ikke tilladt. Kæledyr er desværre heller ikke muligt. Det er en studiebolig med fokus på ro og tryghed for alle beboere.
da.faq9_q: Hvad med sengetøj, håndklæder og rengøring?
da.faq9_a: Sengetøj og håndklæder medbringes selv. Du kan købe billige sæt i IKEA (Amager), Flying Tiger eller Normal. Rengøring af din lejlighed står du selv for — der er støvsuger og rengøringsmidler tilgængelige.
da.cph_title: Mere end bare et kursus — det er en oplevelse
da.cph_text: Cykelkultur, kanaler, specialkaffe, saunagus, havnebad og New Nordic food. København er den perfekte by at fordybe sig i yoga — og i livet.
da.final_title: Klar til at booke din bolig?
da.final_lead: Vælg din foretrukne lejlighedstype og kursusmåned ovenfor — og reserver din plads i dag. Har du spørgsmål? Vi svarer altid hurtigt.
da.final_refund: Risikofrit: Fuld refundering af boligbetaling, hvis kurset aflyses.
da.final_contact: Kontakt os på info@yogabible.dk eller ring +45 53 88 12 09

en.jsonld_desc: Furnished apartments for yoga teacher training students in Copenhagen. Located 800m from Yoga Bible studio in Christianshavn.
en.jsonld_faq1_q: How much does student accommodation cost during Yoga Bible training?
en.jsonld_faq1_a: Single studio apartments cost 9,500 DKK for the full training period. Shared double apartments cost 6,500 DKK per person. All utilities are included.
en.jsonld_faq2_q: How far is the accommodation from Yoga Bible studio?
en.jsonld_faq2_a: The student residence is approximately 800 meters from the Yoga Bible studio at Torvegade 66, Christianshavn — about a 10-minute walk or 3-minute bike ride.
en.jsonld_faq3_q: Can I cook my own food during yoga teacher training in Copenhagen?
en.jsonld_faq3_a: Yes. All apartments have a fully equipped kitchen. Budget supermarkets like Netto and Rema 1000 are nearby. Cooking at home costs approximately 55-75 DKK per day.
en.jsonld_faq4_q: What is the average monthly living cost for a yoga student in Copenhagen?
en.jsonld_faq4_a: Excluding accommodation: food (cooking at home) ~1,500-2,500 DKK/month, bike rental ~175 DKK/month, coffee & extras ~500-800 DKK/month. Total around 2,500-4,000 DKK per month.
en.hero_title: Live close to the studio — we handle the rest
en.hero_subtitle: Furnished apartments in Christianshavn, Copenhagen. Fair prices, everything included, 10 minutes' walk from Yoga Bible. Designed for students traveling here to train.
en.hero_img_alt: Yoga teacher training accommodation Copenhagen Christianshavn
en.why_title: We made it easy for you
en.why_lead: Many of our students travel from other cities in Denmark, from Sweden, Germany, or even further away. That's why we've partnered with a housing provider close to the studio — so you can skip the stressful apartment hunt in Copenhagen and focus 100% on your training.
en.why_checks: No deposit hassle or CPR requirements|Dates aligned with course start and end|Fully furnished with kitchen and bathroom|All utilities included in the price|~800 m from Yoga Bible — walk or cycle|Risk-free: full refund if course is cancelled
en.rooms_lead: We offer two accommodation types specifically for students coming from other cities or abroad. Fair prices, simple logistics, and close to the studio — so you can focus on practice and progression.
en.single_price_fine: Utilities included · Perfect if you want peace, privacy, and a safe space to recharge between workshops.
en.single_features: ~800 m from the studio|Own fully equipped kitchen — cook your own meals|Study & co-working areas|Lounge, café, laundry|24/7 security & fitness access|Utilities included (wifi, electricity, water, heating)|Bike rental available (small fee)
en.double_tag: Shared apartment · Your own private bedroom
en.double_price_note: per person · for the full stay
en.double_price_fine: A great option if you want a fair price and a simple, peaceful base close to the studio.
en.double_features: ~800 m from the studio|Your own private bedroom|Shared kitchen — cook together or on your own|Study & co-working areas|Lounge, café, laundry|24/7 security & fitness access|Utilities included (wifi, electricity, water, heating)|Bike rental available (small fee)
en.rooms_refund: Risk-free: Full refund on accommodation if the course is cancelled.
en.rooms_tip: Tip: Not sure about dates? Contact us at info@yogabible.dk — and we'll help you find the best solution.
en.amenity_title: Everything you need during your stay
en.amenity_lead: The residence is built for students and young professionals. Here's what awaits you.
en.amenity1_desc: Fully equipped with stove, oven, fridge, and utensils. Cook your own healthy meals and save money.
en.amenity2_desc: Quiet zones with wifi, power outlets, and comfortable chairs. Perfect for anatomy reading or planning your teaching.
en.amenity3_desc: Key card system and monitoring. Come and go as you please — even for early morning yoga sessions.
en.amenity4_desc: Washing machines and dryers in the building. No need to carry laundry around the city.
en.amenity5_desc: Fitness center in the building — perfect for supplementary strength training on rest days from the yoga program.
en.amenity6_desc: High-speed wifi, electricity, water, and heating — everything is included. No surprises.
en.cook_lead: All apartments have a fully equipped kitchen. You decide what you eat — and you save significantly compared to eating out in Copenhagen.
en.cook_desc: Budget supermarkets like Netto, Rema 1000, and Lidl are within short walking distance. Many students meal-prep healthy, plant-based meals and share food in the community.
en.cook_tip: Tip: Download the Too Good To Go app — buy surplus food from restaurants and bakeries at half price.
en.loc_lead: Yoga Bible is located at Torvegade 66 in Christianshavn — one of Copenhagen's most charming neighbourhoods. Canals, cafés, Christiania, and the harbour bath are all within a few minutes' walk.
en.loc_map_title: Yoga Bible studio location — Torvegade 66, Christianshavn, Copenhagen
en.budget_eyebrow: What does it cost to live in Copenhagen?
en.budget_lead: Copenhagen isn't cheap — but it doesn't have to be expensive. Here's a realistic overview of your costs as a yoga student (beyond accommodation and course fees).
en.budget_row3_note: Swapfiets 175 DKK/mo · Used bike from 500 DKK
en.budget_row4_note: Cappuccino ~45-55 DKK · Make at home: ~5 DKK
en.budget_tip1: Cycle everywhere. Swapfiets at 175 DKK/mo beats any transport option. Copenhagen is built for bikes.
en.budget_tip2: Meal prep Sunday. Cook for the whole week. Your fellow students do it too — do it together!
en.budget_tip3: Too Good To Go. Surplus food from restaurants and bakeries at 30-50% of the price.
en.budget_tip4: Drink tap water. Copenhagen's water is excellent. Bring a reusable bottle everywhere.
en.alt_eyebrow: Prefer to find your own accommodation?
en.alt_lead: Our offering is the easiest solution — but if you'd rather find something on your own, we've gathered the best options for you below.
en.hotel_desc: All within walking or cycling distance from the studio in Christianshavn.
en.hotel1_desc: Denmark's first floating hotel. 12 intimate rooms with harbour views, geothermal heating, Danish breakfast.
en.hotel2_desc: 128-room design hotel on Paper Island, steps from Nyhavn. Free minibar, rooftop terrace, a la carte restaurant.
en.hotel3_desc: Design hostel with dorms and private rooms near Kongens Nytorv. 10 min cycle to the studio. Perfect for budget-conscious travellers.
en.hotel3_price: Dorm from ~175 DKK · Private from ~860 DKK
en.hotel4_desc: Industrial-Nordic hostel with pool, gym, and cinema. 15 min cycle from the studio. More than a typical hostel.
en.hotel4_price: Dorm from ~220 DKK · Private from ~960 DKK
en.rental_desc: A studio apartment in Christianshavn typically costs 1,000–2,000 DKK/night on Airbnb. For longer stays (4+ weeks) you can often negotiate a better price.
en.coliving_desc: If you're staying longer (8+ weeks), student housing and coliving can be an attractive option.
en.coliving1_desc: 463 apartments, cinema, gym, study rooms, rooftop terrace. Semester-based.
en.coliving2_desc: Community-driven, sustainable, affordable. A social and conscious approach to housing.
en.coliving3_desc: All-inclusive price (rent + wifi + Netflix + cleaning). No deposit. Flexible contracts.
en.fb_desc: Many people find rooms and apartments through Facebook. Here are the most active groups:
en.fb2_desc: ~50,000 members · Free and safe housing search
en.fb4_desc: English · Find a roommate for shared apartment
en.fb_scam_warning: ⚠️ Watch out for scams: Never transfer money before you've seen the apartment and signed a contract. Use verified platforms and be wary of too-good-to-be-true offers.
en.course_lead: Accommodation is relevant for students traveling to Copenhagen. Here are the programs that typically require a place to stay.
en.course1_desc: 200-hour Yoga Alliance certification. Full immersion — Monday to Saturday, morning to evening.
en.course2_desc: 200-hour certification with more time for integration. Perfect balance between intensity and everyday life.
en.course3_desc: Combine 2-3 specialty courses (inversions, splits, backbends) into one intensive month at a discount.
en.faq_lead: Everything you need to know before booking.
en.faq1_q: When can I move in and out?
en.faq1_a: Move-in is typically 1-2 days before the course starts, and move-out is the day after the course ends. The exact dates depend on which month you choose. We'll send you all the details once you've reserved.
en.faq2_q: What is included in the price?
en.faq2_a: All utilities are included: wifi, electricity, water, heating. The apartment is fully furnished with bed, desk, wardrobe, kitchen (stove, fridge, utensils), and bathroom. Bed linen and towels are not provided — but can be bought cheaply at IKEA/Flying Tiger.
en.faq3_a: Yes! The residence offers bike rental (small fee). You can also use Swapfiets (175 DKK/mo for your own bike with repair service included) or buy a used bike via DBA.dk or Facebook Marketplace from 500-1,500 DKK.
en.faq4_a: No, there is no deposit or extra fees. You pay the full price at reservation, and that's it. No surprises.
en.faq5_q: What if the course is cancelled?
en.faq5_a: If Yoga Bible cancels the course, you receive a full refund on your accommodation payment. Risk-free.
en.faq6_a: That depends on availability. Contact us at info@yogabible.dk, and we'll check the options for you. Many students choose to stay a bit longer in Copenhagen after the course.
en.faq7_a: Single apartments are private — you live alone. Double apartments are shared with a fellow student of the same gender, unless you arrange otherwise (e.g., couples or friends traveling together).
en.faq8_q: Can I have guests or pets?
en.faq8_a: Overnight guests are generally not allowed. Pets are unfortunately not possible either. It's student housing with a focus on peace and comfort for all residents.
en.faq9_q: What about bed linen, towels, and cleaning?
en.faq9_a: Bring your own bed linen and towels. You can buy affordable sets at IKEA (Amager), Flying Tiger, or Normal. You're responsible for cleaning your own apartment — vacuum cleaner and cleaning supplies are available.
en.cph_title: More than just a course — it's an experience
en.cph_text: Bike culture, canals, specialty coffee, sauna rituals, harbour baths, and New Nordic food. Copenhagen is the perfect city to immerse yourself in yoga — and in life.
en.final_lead: Choose your preferred apartment type and course month above — and reserve your spot today. Have questions? We always reply quickly.
en.final_refund: Risk-free: Full refund on accommodation if the course is cancelled.
en.final_contact: Contact us at info@yogabible.dk or call +45 53 88 12 09
